description_long: This skateboard features a wooden deck with a glossy finish and a distinctive graphic design in the center, combining abstract and possibly animal motifs in shades of gray, white, and orange. The deck is elongated and slightly concave, with upturned nose and tail for trick performance. Four white polyurethane wheels are mounted on metal trucks, which appear to be standard street style with a polished metallic look. The grip tape on the top of the deck is patterned, providing both traction and visual interest. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for urban environments such as skate parks, sidewalks, and streets.
description: A long, wooden skateboard with a glossy finish, central graphic artwork, white wheels, metal trucks, and patterned grip tape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upturned nose, white wheels, and the central deck graphic.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the deck, the concave shape, and the arrangement of the wheels and trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail's curvature, wheel placement, and the continuation of the deck's graphic.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck's length, wheel alignment, and the detailed artwork.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a central graphic with abstract and possibly animal motifs, primarily in gray, white, and orange, with a circular pattern and intricate detailing.
attribute_wheel_type: street, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard street trucks, polished silver color, standard mounting, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Patterned grip tape in gray and black, with a textured design and partial cut-out revealing the deck graphic
